commands.review_summary:
The branch updates memory-core QMD manager code and tests to generate agent-scoped mcporter configs, strip QMD XDG env from mcporter spawns, preserve configured mcporter servers, parse log-prefixed JSON, and key mcporter daemon starts per generated config path.

PR surface: Source +214, Tests +410. Total +624 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path for the review finding: the PR always rewrites the generated config, and mcporter source treats config mtime drift as stale daemon state; I did not run live tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair lane can make the generated config write content-stable and add focused daemon-stability coverage without changing the main QMD fix direction.
